name: motif
description: Personal development workflow plugin. Encodes a 4-stage process (Research, Plan, Build, Validate) for any codebase.

interface.longDescription: Motif encodes a rigorous 4-stage development process: Research, Plan, Build, Validate. The plan is the single approval gate — once approved, build and validate run autonomously. Works on any Agent Skills runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use motif to add a feature.
Use motif to fix a bug.
